# @tyravel/cache

Cache stores and repository for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/cache
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/cache`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/cache) |
| Category | Platform services |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

- [@tyravel/redis](/reference/generated/packages/redis)

From the package entry point (`dist/index.d.ts`). Deep imports are not supported.
